name: amazon-asin-monitor
description: Run auditable Amazon ASIN frontend checks and produce evidence-rich Excel reports.

interface.shortDescription: Audit Amazon ASINs and produce Excel evidence
interface.longDescription: Runs deterministic Amazon.com frontend inspections from project workbooks, checks Buy Box signals, prices, discounts, reviews, breadcrumbs, rankings, and embeds screenshot evidence in Excel reports.
defaultPrompt: Run the Amazon ASIN frontend monitor for all pending projects.
Audit the latest ASIN monitor workbook and report exceptions.
Deploy the packaged Amazon ASIN monitor to D:\Codex.
